tagline: Localize rẹ repo lori gbogbo commit.

hero.title: Bonjour à tous les langues
hero.lede: Oju-iwe yii ni itumọ nipasẹ Onitumọ Orisun funrararẹ, lori gbogbo titari si akọkọ, si gbogbo ede ti Azure AI Translator ṣe atilẹyin.

phrases.machine_translated: Õî÷ó ïîìî÷ü íà ýòîò ñ÷ ̧ò Azure AI Translator.
phrases.open_pull_request: Ṣii ibeere fifa pẹlu awọn itumọ tuntun.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Gbe software rẹ nibikibi lori Earth.
phrases.thank_you: O ṣeun fun igbiyanju Resource Translator.

features.fast: Ṣe itumọ awọn orisun ni iṣẹju-aaya.
features.reliable: Yika-irin ajo gbogbo baiti ti awọn faili orisun rẹ.
features.configurable: Ohun orin, ile-iṣẹ, glossary, asọtẹlẹ — gbogbo wọn le ṣeto.
features.ci_native: Ti a ṣe apẹrẹ fun awọn iṣe GitHub ati awọn iṣan-iṣẹ fifa-beere.

footer.powered_by: Agbara nipasẹ Resource Translator ati Azure AI Translator.
